name: Certificate Request Export to Exchange Webserver
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Certificate Request Export to Exchange Webserver
SIGMA Description: Detects a write of an Exchange CSR to an untypical directory or with aspx name suffix which can be used to place a webshell

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Defender 365, Dhalman ME O365, Health360 O365, O365, Microsoft Azure H360

when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new-exchangecertificate%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -generaterequest%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -binaryencoded%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -requestfile%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\localhost\c$%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\\127.0.0.1\c$%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\inetpub%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.aspx%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Certificate Request Export to Exchange Webserver on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Defender 365, Dhalman ME O365, Health360 O365, O365, Microsoft Azure H360

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new-exchangecertificate%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -generaterequest%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -binaryencoded%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -requestfile%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\localhost\c$%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\\127.0.0.1\c$%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%c:\inetpub%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.aspx%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Certificate Request Export to Exchange Webserver
